## 📌 About This Project

**This is a portfolio project and personal assessment piece.** While I appreciate your interest, I am not actively accepting pull requests at this time.

However, I'm always open to:
- **Bug reports** via [Issues](../../../issues)
- **Feature suggestions** via [Issues](../../../issues)
- **Documentation improvements** via [Issues](../../../issues)
- **Feedback** via email or discussions

---

## 📋 If You're Submitting Feedback Instead

### 📝 Type of Feedback
- [ ] Bug report
- [ ] Feature suggestion
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Code review / learning feedback
- [ ] Other

### 📄 Description
Provide a clear description of your feedback.

### 🔍 Context
Add any relevant context, screenshots, or code examples.
